compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: Implemented + independently code-reviewed (subagent). v2 schema adds branch/loop/map (additionalProperties:false, oneOf exactly-one discriminator, mandatory max_iterations, while/until mutually exclusive); v1->v2 pure-version-bump shim + golden round-trip; frame-scoped linter (per-frame acyclic needs, no cross-frame edges, loop.<var>/map.<as> bindings, map 'as' scoped to body, same-frame ref precedence). lint.py split into lint_refs.py (frame linter) + lint.py (secret/prompt/collector) along call-graph seam; both under 800 LOC. Reviewer: no blockers; 1 MINOR (shadowed-id false-negative) fixed+regression-tested. 200 tests pass, ruff clean. Commit 2b38ad5d.

compiled_state.description:
## Why
The engine needs a lean DECLARATIVE IR expressing steps + conditionals + loops + map as DATA — the git source
of truth, agent-editable, and projectable to a visual editor. v1 is a strict acyclic DAG whose only control
flow is an `if:` skip-guard, which cannot express branching, loops, or fan-out.

## What
Define a v2 schema extending the v1 GitHub-Actions-style YAML: route/conditional edges, loop frames (mandatory
max_iterations), and map/fan-out over a collection; stable step ids. Add a v1->v2 migration shim and update the
linter so cycles are legal ONLY via declared loop frames (raw `needs` cycles still rejected), with frame-scoped
reference integrity and map `as` binding checks.

## Scope
- src/rebar/schemas/workflow.v2.schema.json (additionalProperties:false retained)
- src/rebar/llm/workflow/schema.py, lint.py, migrate.py
Out: the interpreter (separate story).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] workflow.v2.schema.json adds route/loop/map constructs; additionalProperties:false retained.
- [ ] v1->v2 migrate shim registered in migrate.py with a golden round-trip test.
- [ ] Linter: raw `needs` cycles rejected; declared loop frames legal; frame-scoped reference checks; map `as` binding validated.
- [ ] Registry/coverage guard passes.
compiled_state.title: v2 declarative IR: schema, linter, and v1-to-v2 migration
